title: What does the claimant want from the claim?
h1: What does the claimant want from the claim? (optional)
legend: What does the claimant want if their claim is successful?
compensationOnlyHint: You'll be asked to provide an estimate of total compensation

tribunalRecommendation.checkbox: If claiming discrimination, a tribunal recommendation

tribunalRecommendationHint: You'll be asked to describe the claimant's request to the tribunal

oldJob.checkbox: If claiming unfair dismissal, to get their old job back and be compensated

anotherJob.checkbox: If claiming unfair dismissal, to get another job with the same employer or associated employer and compensation (re-engagement)
